---
title: "Teaching"
---

## As Instructor of record

**Spring 2026**   
DS 150: Computing in Python: Fundamentals and Procedural Programming    
DS 740: Data Mining & Machine Learning

**Fall 2025**   
DS 150: Computing in Python: Fundamentals and Procedural Programming    
Math 109: Precalculus Algebra

**Summer 2024**  
[Math 340: Differential Equations](teaching/ode_summer24.qmd)

**Spring 2021**  
[Math 250: Applied Calculus](teaching/calc_math250_sp21.qmd)

**Fall 2020**  
[Precalculus Algebra](teaching/precalculus.qmd)

---

## As Recitation Instructor

**Spring 2024**  
Math 150: Plane Trigonometry and Analytic Geometry

**Fall 2023**  
Calculus III: Multivariable Calculus

**Spring 2022**  
Math 221: Analytic Geometry and Calculus II
